senses.definition: used to convey that someone or something is conforming to a particular standard, guideline, or expectation

examples.x: The company's decision to raise employee salaries is in line with its commitment to fair compensation practices.
Her behavior is in line with the school's code of conduct.
The new policy is in line with industry regulations.
His decision is in line with the recommendations of the committee.
The project proposal is in line with the client's requirements.

senses.definition: occurring simultaneously or alongside something else

examples.x: The marketing team worked in parallel with the development team to launch the new product.
The construction of the new building proceeded in parallel with the renovation of the existing structure.
The development of the website occurred in parallel with the creation of the mobile app.
The research teams worked in parallel with each other to gather data for the study.
The review process for the manuscript ran in parallel with revisions suggested by peer reviewers.

senses.definition: moving at the same pace, rhythm, or level as someone or something else

examples.x: The company's growth strategy is in step with current market trends.
Her progress in learning the new skill is in step with her classmates'.
The team's performance is in step with the expectations of the coach.
The organization's goals are in step with its mission statement.
His career trajectory is in step with his ambitions.

senses.definition: in perfect alignment or harmony with something

examples.x: Her actions were in sync with her words, demonstrating her commitment to the cause.
His ideas were in sync with the company's vision for the future.
The team's efforts were in sync with the project timeline.
The music and the choreography were in sync with each other.
Her goals were in sync with her values and aspirations.

senses.definition: used to show that two or more people or things are working together or happening at the same time to achieve a common goal

examples.x: The two departments worked in tandem with each other to complete the project on time.
The marketing campaign ran in tandem with the release of the new feature.
The teams collaborated in tandem with each other to complete the project on time.
The negotiations proceeded in tandem with discussions about partnership opportunities.
The research projects progressed in tandem with each other, sharing data and resources.

senses.definition: acting or happening together in perfect agreement or harmony

examples.x: The choir sang in unison with the orchestra, creating a beautiful and cohesive performance.
The students recited the pledge of allegiance in unison with each other.
The dancers moved in unison with the music, creating a beautiful performance.
The athletes ran in unison with each other, striving toward the same goal.
Their actions were in unison with their words, showing genuine commitment.

senses.definition: in accordance with a specific rule, guideline, or standard

examples.x: The company operates in adherence to strict quality control procedures to ensure product safety.
Employees are expected to conduct themselves in adherence to the company's code of conduct.
The project was completed in adherence to the established timeline.
All products must be manufactured in adherence to safety standards.
Students must submit their assignments in adherence to the formatting guidelines.

senses.definition: in harmony with a particular idea, opinion, or viewpoint

examples.x: The new policy is in agreement with the values of the organization.
Her decision was in agreement with the recommendations of the committee.
His actions are in agreement with his stated intentions.
The results of the study are in agreement with previous research findings.
The changes to the curriculum are in agreement with educational standards.

senses.definition: adhering to a specific rule, regulation, or requirement

examples.x: The company must operate in compliance with federal safety standards.
Employees are required to dress in compliance with the company's dress code.
All products must be manufactured in compliance with safety standards.
The event was organized in compliance with local laws and regulations.
Students are expected to complete their assignments in compliance with the guidelines.

senses.definition: in accordance with a particular standard, expectation, or norm

examples.x: The project was completed in conformity with industry standards.
The behavior of the employees should be in conformity to the company's code of conduct.
The dress code must be followed in conformity with company policy.
The actions of the organization should be in conformity to ethical principles.

senses.definition: in harmony with a particular concept or idea

examples.x: The new marketing campaign is designed in congruence with the brand's core values.
Her actions were in congruence with her stated values.
The design of the building is in congruence with the surrounding landscape.
His remarks were in congruence with the theme of the event.
The changes to the curriculum are in congruence with educational standards.

senses.definition: used to indicate a matching or parallel relationship with something else

examples.x: The data collected was in correspondence with the patterns observed in previous research.
Her actions were in correspondence with her words, demonstrating sincerity.
The expenses reported were in correspondence with the budget allocations.
His schedule is in correspondence to the deadlines set by the project manager.
The observed trends are in correspondence to the predictions made by the analysts.

senses.definition: having characteristics or qualities similar to a particular type or category

examples.x: The behavior of the animal was in nature of a nocturnal predator.

senses.definition: used to show compliance with a specific rule, guideline, or standard

examples.x: All employees are required to act in accordance with the company's code of ethics.
The company operates in accordance with industry regulations.
The event was organized in accordance with local laws and regulations.
All products must be manufactured in accordance with safety standards.
Students are expected to complete their assignments in accordance with the guidelines.

senses.definition: in the act of carrying out or achieving a task, duty, or obligation as required or expected

examples.x: He completed the project in fulfillment of his commitment to the client, meeting all the specified requirements.
The project was completed in fulfillment of the contract requirements.
She traveled to the conference in fulfillment of her professional development goals.
The donation was made in fulfillment of the organization's mission to support the community.
The report was submitted in fulfillment of the academic requirements for graduation.
